headline: Workday, Anthropic, and Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC) Launch AI-Focused Solopreneurship Accelerator Program
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, today announced the launch of the Workday Foundation Solopreneurship Accelerator Program, a new AI-focused initiative designed to support the next generation of small businesses. Delivered in partnership with Anthropic and Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC), the Accelerator will combine philanthropy with the power of AI to support solo entrepreneurs across select communities in the United S

headline: WDAY (WORKDAY INC-CLASS A) Fits Peter Lynch GARP Screen with Low PEG and Strong Profitability
summary: Workday (WDAY) fits Peter Lynch’s GARP strategy with 26.32% EPS growth, a 0.50 PEG ratio, strong finances, and a PE of 13.15—offering sustainable growth at a reasonable valuation.

headline: Bridge Growth Partners Adds Tech Industry Leaders Raghu Ramanathan and Zane Rowe
summary: NEW YORK, May 12, 2026--Bridge Growth Partners, LLC, a leading technology investment firm, today announced the addition of Ragunath (Raghu) Ramanathan as Executive Partner and Zane Rowe as Senior Advisor.

raw.headline: Bridge Growth Partners Adds Tech Industry Leaders Raghu Ramanathan and Zane Rowe

headline: SAP ramps up push to bring AI agents to finance teams
summary: The rollout spans FP&A, tax, and treasury, as SAP moves to an end-to-end approach for automating finance workflows.
